message:
fix: Update ArrayList API for Zig 0.15 compatibility

Zig 0.15 changed ArrayList API:
- ArrayList no longer stores allocator internally
- Methods like append(), appendSlice(), deinit(), toOwnedSlice() now
  require allocator parameter
- Init changed from .init(allocator) to .{} with allocator stored separately

Updated files:
- warnings/context.zig, state.zig, format.zig
- contextlib.zig (ExitStack)
- textwrap.zig (dedent, indentWithPredicate, TextWrapper.wrap)
- calendar.zig (itermonthdays2, formatweekheader, formatmonthname, formatmonth)
- io.zig (readlines)
- pathlib.zig (iterdir, parts)
- stringprep.zig (mapB1, mapB2)
- tempfile.zig (SpooledTemporaryFile)
